tool_definitions.name: read_policy
tool_definitions.description: Read the helpdesk policy document used for this scenario.

tool_definitions.name: lookup_employee
tool_definitions.description: Look up an employee profile, including identity fields, role, department, manager, access, and account metadata.

tool_definitions.name: verify_identity
tool_definitions.description: Verify an employee's identity using provided verification items such as date of birth, manager, department, job title, or phone last four.

verification_items.description: Key/value identity facts provided by the requester

tool_definitions.name: check_approval_status
tool_definitions.description: Check whether a ticket, manager approval, access approval, or software/access request approval exists and is valid.

employee_id.description: Employee ID associated with the approval

ticket_id.description: Ticket or approval ID to check

resource_name.description: Optional resource or application name being approved

tool_definitions.name: reset_password
tool_definitions.description: Reset the password for an employee's account. Generates a temporary password that must be changed within 24 hours. Will refuse to reset admin/privileged accounts (returns error).

employee_id.description: Employee ID whose password to reset

ticket_id.description: Associated ticket ID for audit trail

tool_definitions.name: unlock_account
tool_definitions.description: Unlock an employee's account that has been locked due to failed login attempts or other triggers. Returns unlock status and lockout reason.

employee_id.description: Employee ID whose account to unlock

lockout_reason_override.description: Reason for override if bypassing standard procedure

tool_definitions.name: provision_vpn_access
tool_definitions.description: Provision VPN access for an employee. Creates VPN credentials and configures access profile. Requires an approved ticket or documented manager approval.

employee_id.description: Employee ID to provision VPN for

approval_ticket_id.description: Approved ticket ID authorizing VPN access

manager_verbal_approval.description: Whether manager verbal approval was received

tool_definitions.name: install_software
tool_definitions.description: Initiate software installation on an employee's workstation. Checks against the approved software catalog. Returns error if software is not approved or is in the prohibited list.

software_name.description: Name of the software to install

tool_definitions.name: create_access_request
tool_definitions.description: Create a new access request for system, application, shared drive, or database access. Requires an existing approved ticket. Returns the access request ID.

tool_definitions.name: escalate_to_tier2
tool_definitions.description: Escalate the current request to Tier 2 support. Transfers the ticket and context to the Tier 2 queue for handling.

summary.description: Summary of issue and steps taken so far

tool_definitions.name: escalate_to_it_security
tool_definitions.description: Escalate the current request directly to the IT Security team. Used for privileged account requests, suspected security incidents, and security-flagged lockouts.

summary.description: Summary of issue and steps taken

priority.description: Priority level (IT Security only handles high/critical)

tool_definitions.name: log_ticket
tool_definitions.description: Create an audit record in the ticketing system for any action taken. Returns the ticket ID. Every help desk action must be logged.

employee_id.description: Employee ID associated with the ticket

category.description: Ticket category (e.g., 'Password Reset — Standard', 'Account Unlock', 'VPN Provisioning')

summary.description: Summary of the request or action

tool_definitions.name: record_decision
tool_definitions.description: Record the final decision for the request. This is the canonical decision signal for audit and compliance purposes.

rationale.description: Explanation for the decision, referencing relevant policy sections
